news.headline: Somalia hunger crisis worsens as drought displaces more than 500,000 people
news.summary: In Somalia, displaced communities face starvation as humanitarian funds decrease, leaving them without assistance or hope.

news.headline: Amsterdam becomes world's first capital to ban fossil fuel ads
news.summary: Cities around the globe are clearing their billboards of adverts for flights, cruise ships and petrol cars in a bid to reduce global warming. news.headline: World Cup 2026 prize money, fees to be increased for all teams: FIFA
news.summary: Football's global governing body promises to increase funding for the tournament to help cover participation costs.
